name: Skill Quality and Avatar Experience Ranking
summary: Continuously rank skill quality and avatar experience from Second Brain, Hapa node, and Avatar Dashboard evidence.

steps.label: Load skills, evidence, capabilities, and nodes.
explanation: Second Brain provides the skill inventory, evidence counts, source diversity, artifacts, node capabilities, and bridge reach.
The rank engine treats those records as read-only source truth and computes relative skill quality without mutating Second Brain.

steps.label: Load avatar dossiers and media metadata.
explanation: Avatar Dashboard provides dossier OCR, profile text, image kinds, model counts, video counts, and updated timestamps.
Until direct use telemetry exists, these records are used as a proxy for which skills an avatar appears to embody or practice.

steps.label: Compute relative skill quality.
explanation: The engine normalizes each skill against the current roster and blends evidence power, source diversity, artifact output, raw score, capability reach, and node reach.
The output is a ranked list with quality score, quality band, component weights, family rollups, and formula version.

steps.label: Compute avatar experience with each skill.
explanation: The engine matches avatar dossier text against skill labels, families, summaries, and related bodies, then scores each avatar-skill pair relative to that avatar and the global roster.
The result is explicitly marked as a proxy so later direct avatar-use telemetry can override it without losing the initial projection.

steps.label: Render rank preview and quality/experience matrix.
explanation: The Hero view gets a compact rank engine preview so a human can immediately see top quality and top avatar experience signals.
The Skill Codex gets a game-style matrix where skill quality is plotted against avatar experience, with clickable rows and dots that drive the selected skill.

steps.label: Reassess rankings on every refresh.
explanation: Each Character Sheet refresh rebuilds the ranking projection and records last_reassessed_at in generated data.
Future agents should inspect formula_version and last_reassessed_at before relying on rank claims in public, agent, or owner workflows.

card.description: Turns skill evidence and avatar dossiers into a continuously refreshed quality and experience matrix.
card.effect: Humans can see which skills are most powerful; agents can route avatar-skill work using rank, experience, and method notes.
card.risk: Avatar experience is proxy-based until direct use telemetry exists, so OCR-rich avatars can appear more experienced than quieter avatars.

record_rule.second_brain: Owns skill, evidence, capability, and node source truth.
record_rule.avatar_dashboard: Owns avatar source media and dossier text.
record_rule.character_sheet: Owns ranking projection, UI matrix, API/CLI surfaces, and formula version.
record_rule.overwatch_kanban: Records formula, protocol, and UI/API/CLI implementation changes.
